---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
sidebar: false
page-navigation: false
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .page-navigation {display: none;}
</style>
```
Greetings! 你好！My name is Tong Zeng. ![](images/greetings.gif){width="48"}

I am current study in the M.S. in Computer Science Program at Virginia Tech, working with Professor Dawei Zhou in the VT Learning on Graphs (VLOG) Lab. My research interest lies in the intersection of pre-trained large language models and knowledge graphs.
